productDisplayName: Jockey SPORT Men Black Innerwear Vest 9924
description: Style Note This sport t-shirt from jockey is a must have summer essential that can be worn for all your training sessions or just when you are chilling out with friends. The soft fabric gives you a comfortable feel and the cut is simply fashionable. Pair this tee with track pants and training shoes or shorts and sandals Product Details Black sleeveless vest that has a trendy square shaped neckline, wider armholes for maximum freedom and comfort, brand badge on the back and can be worn as training wear, lounge wear or even under your shirt as an all purpose use Material and Care 100% combed cotton Machine wash delicate inside out at 40 degrees with like colours Do not bleach or dry clean Tumble dry low Warm iron do not iron on decorations
